title: AI Image Editing in ComfyUI: Flux 2 Klein (Ep04)
description:
Learn how to generate and edit images in ComfyUI using Flux 2 Klein, a fast, low-VRAM AI image model from Black Forest Labs. In this tutorial, you’ll see how to set up Flux 2 Klein (4B and 9B), install the required models, and build image generation workflows from scratch, then adapt them for AI image editing and inpainting.

What this tutorial teaches you:
- How Flux 2 Klein works and how it differs from larger Flux models
- The difference between Flux 2 Klein 4B vs 9B (speed, quality, VRAM, license)
- Where to install diffusion models, text encoders, and VAEs in ComfyUI
- Building a Flux 2 Klein workflow step by step
- Correct KSampler settings for distilled Flux models (steps, CFG)
- How to prepare workflows for image editing and inpainting
- Running Flux 2 Klein efficiently on low VRAM GPUs

This video is ideal for ComfyUI users, AI artists, and beginners who want fast image generation and image editing workflows without needing high-end hardware.

Workflows download links (Discord
